holdings.infoBox: JDOC is an equity ETF with a total of 66 individual holdings. The top holdings are Eli Lilly and Company stock at 8.03%, AbbVie at 7.47%, UnitedHealth Group at 6.48%, Johnson & Johnson at 4.87%, and Merck & Co. at 4.59%.

overview.description: The JPMorgan Healthcare Leaders ETF (JDOC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in health care equity. The fund is actively managed, investing in equity securities issued by pharmaceutical, biotechnology, healthcare services, healthcare technology, medical technology and life sciences companies located around the globe.The adviser seeks to provide long-term capital appreciation.   JDOC was launched on Nov 1, 2023 and is issued by JPMorgan Chase.
